structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-09-30 Arcasa Solar Joins NOVA's DPA Program Offerings
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-09-30 13:58:38-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

The mortgage market continues to present a range of challenges, particularly with respect to borrowers’ ability to secure down payment funds. In response, Capital Markets is pleased to announce its partnership with Arcasa and presents the NOVA Smart Solar program. This collaboration extends beyond a traditional solar initiative by offering borrowers an additional path towards sustainable homeownership with assistance up to 5.5% in the form of a grant or forgivable second mortgage. 

 

Channel: Banked

Product Type: Down Payment Assistance

 Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/Ers0g1tIhThEhDBYSBswFHgBm9KhvwOMwHjhpZiTciXyaQ?e=YNqpIK> 

 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EidmBz2pkfhHr9B3KfQiocwB9qTI_CXI-1z-uFcfKtnJFg?e=F9Dte0> 

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	Assistance up to 5.5% of purchase price or appraised value (whichever is lower)

	*	DPA in the form of a grant or forgivable second mortgage
	*	10-year term, no interest, no monthly payments; forgiven after solar is installed 

*	Purchase and refinance available
*	Existing solar permitted
*	No income limits or FTHB requirement
*	Minimum 580 FICO
*	Arcasa system upgrades available, including but not limited to new roofs, electrical panel upgrades, residential batteries (BESS) and EV chargers
*	Maximum loan amount: FHA county loan limit +20% (120% CLTV)
*	1-4 unit properties only: SFR, Townhome, PUD, Manufactured homes (condos ineligible)

 

COMPARISON



 

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	Available with NOVA FHA locks only; files will be retained
*	May be combined with other Assistance Programs such as grants, subordinate liens, gifts, and MCCs. 

	*	Maximum 3rd lien position

*	Homebuyer education not required
*	CM Codes for second mortgage option: FFDAR, FFDARMH, SFDAR, SFDARMH

 

ATTACHMENTS

*	Marketing

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us:

 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
